assistant_id.description: Unique identifier of the AI assistant

primary_color.description: Hex color code for the widget header and buttons

font_family.description: Font family used within the chat window

language_mode.description: Default layout and language. 'auto' detects client browser locale

en.default: Hello! How can we help you today?

greeting_message.description: Custom greeting message mapping per language

suggested_questions.description: List of suggested questions displayed on chat open

auto_open_delay.description: Delay in seconds before the widget automatically pops open

en.default: We are currently offline. Please leave your details and we will get back to you.

ar.default: نحن خارج أوقات العمل حالياً. يرجى ترك بياناتك وسنقوم بالرد عليك قريباً.

offline_mode.description: Widget behavior when all live human agents are offline
